message:
style(tests): Improve RwLock safety tests with lints and clarity

Documentation:
- Add backticks around type names per doc convention: RwLock, parking_lot,
  Viewport, LogsPage, etc.

Code improvements:
- Use range.contains() instead of manual >= && <= bounds checks
- Inline format args in assert messages
- Simplify lock usage: drop intermediate bindings where read/write
  is immediately consumed
- Fix tautological assertion that was always true (viewport render check)
- Strengthen assertions to check actual expected values instead of
  vacuous "readable" checks
- Add explicit drop() for early lock release before panic

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
